properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v6

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: You are the One There's no one else Who lifts me up And gives me water from the dwell But there's a hole That seems to drain it all away And once again I'm left in fear and doubt When all my strength is crying out

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: So here I am again Willing to be opened up and broken Like a flower in the rain Tell me what have I to do To die and then be raised To reach beyond the pain Like a flower in the rain

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: The evil wind it blows a storm To rock my world Just when I think I'm safe and warm I'm led astray far too easily It's always hard for me to say I'm wrong Until I know I can't go on

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: So here I am again Willing to be opened up and broken Like a flower in the rain Tell me what have I to do To die and then be raised To reach beyond the pain Like a flower in the rain

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Lord, You have searched me and know When I sleep and when I rise You're familiar with all my ways Even the darkness will shine like the day When You look into my heart

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: So here I am again Willing to be opened up and broken Like a flower in the rain Tell me what have I to do To die and then be raised To reach beyond the pain Like a flower in the rain
